prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约672→898→729→699→706名，整体波动区间在672–898之间，近两年趋于稳定在700名左右；2025年基准位次约706名；该校在吉林省物理类招生计划2021年105人、2022年104人、2023年101人、2024年101人、2025年101人，2026年计划101人，连续四年持平，无扩招或缩招信号，对 竞争格局影响中性。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京航空航天大学为985、211、双一流高校；软科中国大学排名从2021年第15名持续上升至2026年第11名，稳居全国顶尖工科院校前列，对 高分考生吸引力持续增强；2026年高考周期内北航声誉评价为"明显负面"，主要因杨昀导师师德失范与学术不端事件引发舆论关注，可能对部分考生报考意愿产 生轻微抑制作用；抖音热度排名第56位（较热），整体曝光量一般，未见显著升温信号；历史投档异常记录中2024年曾出现偏负面舆情（知乎内卷讨论），但未出现断档；航空宇航科学与技术、计算机科学与技术、软件工程、材料科学与工程、仪器科学与技术等16个学科获评A-及以上，其中A+学科7个，学科实力顶尖，与招生专业高度 匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等北航核心专业大类在2024–2026年持续高热推荐，社会关注度高，可能推高相关专业组竞争热度；吉林省20 26年高考总人数约110868人，物理类考生估算约79936人（较2025年80421人略降约0.6%），考生规模微降对竞争压力有轻微缓解作用；北航位于北京，属全国性顶尖高校，在吉林省无特殊地域偏好。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合招生计划连续四年 持平、考生规模微降、学校排名持续上升与声誉负面事件对冲，以及王牌专业社会热度高企等因素，预计2026年物理类最低录取位次在2025年706名基础上小幅后移，预测最低位 次约716名，区间634–798名。

一档（最难进）

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间634–798名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如650名以内）可重点冲击未来空天领军计划、微电子卓越 班等一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（如780名左右）应以三档保底专业为主，兼顾二档中等专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 672 → 898 → 729 → 699 → 706, with an overall fluctuation range of 672–898, stabilizing around 700 in recent years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 706; the enrollment plan for this university in Jilin Province Physics Category was 105 in 2021, 104 in 2022, 101 in 2023, 101 in 2024, 101 in 2025, and 101 in 2026, remaining flat for four consecutive years, with no signals of expansion or contraction, having a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beihang University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; its ranking in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings has steadily risen from 15th in 2021 to 11th in 2026, firmly among the top engineering institutions in the country, continuously enhancing its appeal to high-scoring students; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, Beihang's reputation evaluation is 'significantly negative,' mainly due to the mentor Yang Yun's ethics misconduct and academic integrity incident, which has drawn public attention and may slightly suppress some students' willingness to apply; its Douyin popularity ranking is 56th (relatively hot), with overall exposure being average, showing no significant warming signals; historical enrollment anomaly records show a somewhat negative public opinion in 2024 (Zhihu discussion on involution), but no gaps occurred; 16 disciplines including Aerospace Science and Technology, Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, and Instrument Science and Technology have been rated A- or above, with 7 A+ disciplines, demonstrating top-tier academic strength highly matched with the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core major categories of Beihang such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering have been consistently highly recommended from 2024 to 2026, with high social attention, potentially increasing competition for related major groups; the total number of Jilin Province 2026 college entrance examination candidates is approximately 110,868, with Physics Category candidates estimated at about 79,936 (a slight decrease of about 0.6% from 80,421 in 2025), and the slight reduction in candidate scale has a minor alleviating effect on competitive pressure; Beihang is located in Beijing, a top national university, with no special regional preference in Jilin Province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the enrollment plan remaining flat for four consecutive years, a slight decrease in candidate scale, the university's continuously rising ranking offset by negative reputation events, and the high social popularity of its flagship majors, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly shift backward from the 2025 ranking of 706, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 716, and a range of 634–798.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Aerospace Leading Program)
- Microelectronics Science and Engineering (Outstanding Talent Training Experimental Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Computing and Intelligent Science Category).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Information Science and Technology Category)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Aerospace Category)
- Engineering Mechanics (Top-Notch Student Training Program)
- Science Experimental Class (Sino-French Engineer Institute).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Science Experimental Class (Including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Medical-Engineering Cross Experimental Class)
- Chemistry (Top-Notch Student Training Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 634–798, it is recommended to primarily fill in Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 majors as a stretch and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 650), focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors such as the Future Aerospace Leading Program and Microelectronics Excellence Class; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 780), prioritize Tier 3 safety majors while also considering Tier 2 moderate majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 320 → 421 → 356 → 312 → 316, with an overall fluctuation range of 312–421, stabilizing in the last two years at 312–316; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 316; the enrollment plan for this university in Jilin Province for liberal arts/history category was 3 in 2021, 4 in 2022, 5 in 2023, 6 in 2024, 3 in 2025, and 3 in 2026, unchanged from 2025 but reduced by 3 compared to 2024, with enrollment scale at a historical low.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beihang University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science ranking has continuously risen to 11th in 2026, and its positioning as a top engineering institution also has brand appeal for liberal arts candidates; in 2026, Beihang's reputation evaluation is 'clearly negative' (Yang Yun incident), which may slightly suppress willingness to apply; Douyin popularity ranking is 56th (relatively hot), with no abnormal heating; no history of admission gaps; Foreign Language and Literature is rated A-level, directly related to the history category enrollment majors (Social Science Pilot Class, Foreign Language Interdisciplinary Pilot Class), with outstanding disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Social Science Pilot Class covers law, economics, administrative management, etc., with law being socially hot (recommended) and economics showing divided opinions; the Foreign Language Interdisciplinary Pilot Class involves English and translation, with foreign language majors having generally average social popularity; the estimated number of history category candidates in Jilin Province in 2026 is about 30,932 (slightly down about 0.4% from 31,071 in 2025), with a slight decrease in candidate scale; Beihang is located in Beijing, a nationally top university, with no special regional preference; local_enrollment_share data is missing.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the enrollment plan being reduced from 2024 and maintained at a low level, a slight decrease in candidate scale, the offset between the university's brand appeal and negative reputation events, and the social heat of majors like law, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for the history category in 2026 will slightly shift backward from the 2025 ranking of 316, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 321, and a range of 284–358.

For rankings within the predicted range of 284–358, it is recommended to prioritize the Social Science Pilot Class as the main choice, with the Foreign Language Interdisciplinary Pilot Class as a backup. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 300), focus on applying for the Social Science Pilot Class; if the ranking is close to the upper limit (e.g., around 350), careful evaluation is needed.
